name: Strathmore Plus Uranium Corp.
description: Strathmore Plus Uranium Corp. is a Canadian-based exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium resource properties. The company primarily operates in Wyoming, United States, where it holds interests in several permitted uranium projects, including the Agate, Beaver Rim, and Night Owl properties. By targeting historic uranium deposits and utilizing modern exploration techniques, Strathmore Plus Uranium Corp. aims to advance these assets toward production, contributing to the supply of uranium for the nuclear energy sector. The company is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol SUU.
